history.content:
<thought>
I am at the bottom center facing north. The cell directly in front is lava, so I cannot move forward. The goal G is located to the northeast. To reach it safely, I need to first move east to avoid the lava, then go north. Therefore, I will turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing east, but the cell ahead is a wall. The goal is to the north-west. There is a safe path: go north twice, then west twice. To start, I need to turn left to face north.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located to the northeast. The cell directly in front (north) is lava, so I cannot move forward. The cells to my east are safe floor cells. I need to go east twice, then north twice to reach the goal. Therefore, I will turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located north-west of my position. The cell directly to the east is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The cell to the north is empty floor. I need to face north to move toward the goal. Currently facing east, so I will turn left to face north.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located to the north-east. The cell directly north is lava, so I cannot move forward. The west is a wall. The only safe direction is east, which is a floor cell. I need to turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor cell (`.`). Moving forward will take me closer to the goal which is to the northwest. This is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing east. The goal is to the northwest. The cell directly ahead (east) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn left to face north, then I can move towards the goal. The cell to the north is a floor tile and appears safe.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I cannot move forward. The goal G is located two cells north and one cell east of my position, but the path is blocked by lava in the north. To my east is a safe floor cell. I will turn right to face east, then move forward onto that safe cell, and then proceed north to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. Directly north is a floor cell (.), which is safe. The goal G is at (row6, col2), two cells west and one cell north of the agent's current position. The path ahead is clear: move north onto the floor cell, then later turn west and move twice to reach the goal

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor cell (.), which is safe. The goal G is two cells west and one cell north of the current position. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. I will move north now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
After moving forward, I reached a cell where the cell directly ahead is a wall ('#'). I can see the goal G to my left at the same row. I will turn left to face west and then move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor (.), which is safe. The goal G is two cells north of the agent. Moving forward will bring us closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
